name: Gratitude
description: Gratitude Journal & Mood Tracker This Android app helps you build a daily habit of gratitude while keeping track of your emotional well-being.
features: Track your mood with simple Visualize progress with a weekly progress bar.
Set reminders to never miss a gratitude moment.
deliverables: 🌙 Dark Mode : Switch between light and dark themes
💬 Daily Quotes: Displays an inspirational quote
A new "Mood Insights" section at the top displays a count of how many times you've recorded each mood (😊 😐 😢).
